title: ProtoSynthesis system development
summary: Architecture and development of a connected research ecosystem spanning inquiry, documentary media and long-form knowledge.

lensAssignments.rationale: The responsibility centres on defining the system model, boundaries, structure, workflows or intended operation.
This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on executable digital behaviour implemented in a website, application, interface or connected software system.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Software and web-engineering responsibility: Architecture and development of a connected research ecosystem spanning inquiry, documentary media and long-form knowledge.

lensAssignments.rationale: This is a distinct supporting responsibility: The responsibility centres on creating, managing, transforming or delivering media to an audience.
lensAssignments.lensSummary: Media production and distribution responsibility: Architecture and development of a connected research ecosystem spanning inquiry, documentary media and long-form knowledge.
